channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joe Burrow's early TD run helps Bengals to win over Giants in ugly game
item.description: The Cincinnati Bengals won an ugly game against the New York Giants on Sunday, 17-7, even as Joe Burrow was hit on a ton of plays during the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Burrow runs for a TD and the Bengals' defense carries them past the Giants, 17-7
item.description: Joe Burrow scored on a career-long 47-yard run on the opening possession, and the Cincinnati Bengals’ defense carried them to a much-needed 17-7 victory over the New York Giants.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: Jack Flaherty combined on a three-hitter and Los Angeles Dodgers pitchers tied the postseason record of 33 consecutive scoreless innings by routing the New York Mets 9-0 Sunday night in the NL Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Larson dominates at The Roval to lead all 4 Hendrick cars into next round of NASCAR playoffs
item.description: Kyle Larson raced to his Cup Series-high sixth victory of the season Sunday to easily advance to the third round of NASCAR's playoffs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: Jerry West has made history by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon, Penn State move behind No. 1 Texas. Army, Navy both ranked for 1st time since '60
item.description: Oregon and Penn State each moved up a spot in The Associated Press college football poll on Sunday following thrilling wins in high-profile games, and Top 25 newcomers Navy and Army are in the rankings together for the first time since 1960. Texas strengthened its hold on No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears' Caleb Williams inexplicably throws pass off teammate's facemask
item.description: Chicago Bears rookie quarterback Caleb Williams made a head-scratching play in the first quarter against the Jacksonville Jaguars on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Johnson shrugs off late interception, throws winning TD as No. 18 Kansas St beats Colorado 31-28
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Avery Johnson rebounded from throwing a late interception by finding Jayce Brown for a 50-yard touchdown with 2:14 remaining as No. 18 Kansas State escaped with a 31-28 win over Colorado on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs. Jaguars: Teams battling in early-morning tilt at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Jaguars have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. Inactives for the Bears are DB Jaquan Brisker, DB Tyrique Stevenson, OL Nate Davis, DL Zacch Pickens, WR Velus Jones Jr., DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominque Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Oregon holds off Ohio State's final-second comeback in epic battle of top-three Big Ten programs
item.description: In a new-Big Ten battle with top-three ranked teams, it was the Oregon Ducks narrowly getting by Ohio State in an instant classic on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas stymies Oklahoma's offense to earn Red River Rivalry win in foes' first matchup as SEC members
item.description: For the first time since 2009, Texas is 6-0. The Longhorns won their sixth game of the season, defeating rival Oklahoma in dominating fashion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oregon receiver ejected for spitting on Ohio State player: 'Why even do that?'
item.description: Oregon wide receiver Traeshon Holden was ejected in the second quarter of a game Saturday against Ohio State for spitting on a Buckeyes player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft died Saturday morning from a rare form of lung cancer, coach Mack Brown said. “This young man fought so hard for his two and a half years,” Brown said. “The doctors told us he outlived what he should’ve.
item.dc:creator: DOUG BONJOUR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Cam Rising to start tomorrow at Arizona State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Cam Rising is ready to return to the field. According to a report by ActionNetwork's Brett McMurphy, Rising will start at quarterback for the #16 Utah football team tomorrow night at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5
